en.title: Friends
en.description: A small corner for personal websites and creators I enjoy following.
en.intro: This page stays small and curated. Each card is a doorway to a person, a place, and a way of keeping the web a little more personal.
en.applicationNote: If you would like to exchange links, leave a message below with your site information.
en.guestbookHint: Sign in with GitHub through giscus, then leave your friend-link information here.

zh.title: 友链
zh.description: 这里放一些我愿意长期关注的个人网站和创作者链接。
zh.intro: 友链不必很多，但希望每一个都是真实、有趣、值得偶尔回访的小入口。
zh.applicationNote: 请在下方留言里申请成为相互友链。
zh.applicationFormat:
名称：**
简介：**
链接：**
头像：**
zh.guestbookHint: 使用 GitHub 登录后，按上面的格式留下你的友链信息即可。
